name: part_001
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_001.webm

scenes.description: Aki interacts with the game-themed stage, rolling a giant die and seeing game symbols.
Aki Rosenthal performs "Deal with the devil".

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter Choco Decoration

subtitles.original: やっぱいいや
subtitles.english: Actually, never mind.

subtitles.original: 無駄に知恵が回らされるように
subtitles.english: So that useless wisdom is spun around.

subtitles.original: 離されるように　解るように
subtitles.english: So that I'm separated, so that I understand.

subtitles.original: ガム噛んで口を閉ざすように
subtitles.english: Chewing gum to keep my mouth shut.

subtitles.original: 笑わすより笑われるように
subtitles.english: Better to be laughed at than to make others laugh.

subtitles.original: 人をちゃんと敬うように
subtitles.english: So that I respect people properly.

subtitles.original: 崇めるように　称えるように
subtitles.english: So that I worship, so that I praise.

subtitles.original: 有象無象にならないように
subtitles.english: So that I don't become part of the masses.

subtitles.original: ふざけないように
subtitles.english: So that I don't mess around.

subtitles.original: 集団参賀の終止系
subtitles.english: The final form of collective worship.

subtitles.original: またへいこらへいこら言っちゃって
subtitles.english: Bowing and scraping again.

subtitles.original: 「あれ前髪超絶最高じゃん」とか
subtitles.english: "Oh, your bangs look absolutely amazing."

subtitles.original: どうでもいいのに言っちゃって
subtitles.english: Saying things that don't matter.

subtitles.original: 毎度毎度も限界執着的
subtitles.english: Every single time, borderline obsessive.

subtitles.original: 社会のシューターです
subtitles.english: A shooter for society.

subtitles.original: 決して発狂しないように
subtitles.english: So that I never go insane.

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter choco decoration.

subtitles.original: 時に孤独な愛は君を汚す
subtitles.english: Sometimes, lonely love stains you.

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter choco decoration.

subtitles.original: 鳥肌のあと一口さのあと
subtitles.english: After the goosebumps, after a single bite.

subtitles.original: 初めはあんな大層な
subtitles.english: At first, it was such a grand...

subtitles.original: 大言壮語を並べたが
subtitles.english: ...collection of big words.

subtitles.original: 嫌や嫌やも好きなうち
subtitles.english: Even saying no is a sign of interest.

subtitles.original: いやはやしかし今日が初めてで
subtitles.english: Well, well, but today is the first time...

subtitles.original: こんなとは出来見センスあるよ
subtitles.english: ...you've got some talent to do this much.

subtitles.original: 恋する季節に
subtitles.english: In the season of love.

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter choco decoration.

subtitles.original: 恋する気持ちで
subtitles.english: With feelings of love.

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter choco decoration.

subtitles.original: F.U.C.K.Y.O.U.
subtitles.english: F.U.C.K.Y.O.U.

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter choco decoration.

subtitles.original: 皆が望む理想に憧れて
subtitles.english: Longing for the ideal everyone wants.

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter choco decoration.

subtitles.original: 個性や情を全部焼き払い
subtitles.english: Burning away all individuality and emotion.

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter choco decoration.

subtitles.original: 欲やエゴは殺して土に埋め
subtitles.english: Kill desire and ego, bury them in the dirt.

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter choco decoration.

subtitles.original: 僕は大人にやっと成ったよママ
subtitles.english: I've finally become an adult, Mama.

subtitles.original: 明日の規則の端を
subtitles.english: The edge of tomorrow's rules.

subtitles.original: 地獄は続くどこまでも
subtitles.english: Hell continues everywhere.

subtitles.original: あだこうだ言わず今だけを
subtitles.english: Don't complain, just focus on the now.

subtitles.original: こどものころの気持ちのままで
subtitles.english: Keep your childhood feelings.

subtitles.original: 意地張らずにやってこうぜ
subtitles.english: Let's do this without being stubborn.

subtitles.original: ああ思い出したあの時の生真面目さな
subtitles.english: Ah, I remembered that seriousness from back then.

subtitles.original: やっぱいいや
subtitles.english: Actually, never mind.

subtitles.original: サイコロ...
subtitles.english: The dice...

subtitles.original: 5が出た
subtitles.english: I got a 5.

subtitles.original: 何これ？
subtitles.english: What's this?

subtitles.original: 椅子？
subtitles.english: A chair?

subtitles.original: One, two, one...
subtitles.english: One, two, one...

subtitles.original: Deal with the devil
subtitles.english: Deal with the devil

subtitles.original: アブダワヨのツネ
subtitles.english: It's the way of the world.

subtitles.original: クズ引いた後動じない
subtitles.english: Don't flinch after drawing a dud.

subtitles.original: 肝心なの正体
subtitles.english: The important thing is your true identity.

subtitles.original: 出し抜いてサバイブ
subtitles.english: Outwit them and survive.

subtitles.original: 行き着く先には
subtitles.english: At the end of the road...

subtitles.original: HEAVEN OR HELL?
subtitles.english: ...HEAVEN OR HELL?

subtitles.original: この世界のルール
subtitles.english: The rules of this world...

subtitles.original: たった一つ　勝者が正義
subtitles.english: ...only one thing: the winner is justice.

subtitles.original: 女は度胸
subtitles.english: A woman's courage.

subtitles.original: 散らしてセンスを　アイツは
subtitles.english: Spreading her sense, that guy is...

subtitles.original: やれることなんだってやる　アタシは
subtitles.english: I'll do whatever it takes, I am...

subtitles.original: 賭ケグルイのQueen
subtitles.english: ...the Kakegurui Queen.

subtitles.original: お願い　悦頂戴
subtitles.english: Please, give me pleasure.

subtitles.original: 震えてるわよ　札束
subtitles.english: The stacks of cash are shaking.

subtitles.original: 見分けもつかないわ　私をモノにする
subtitles.english: I can't even tell them apart; you'll make me yours.

subtitles.original: あなたの髪の1本まで全部
subtitles.english: Every single strand of your hair.

subtitles.original: 100万倍　愛絶頂で　酔わせるわよ
subtitles.english: A million times more, at the peak of love, I'll make you drunk.

subtitles.original: 坊や　お残しはさせないわ
subtitles.english: Little boy, I won't let you leave anything behind.

subtitles.original: 見分けもつかない　合格不合格
subtitles.english: I can't tell the difference, pass or fail.

subtitles.original: たまらないわ　スリル誰にも触らせない
subtitles.english: I can't stand it, the thrill, I won't let anyone touch it.

subtitles.original: このマネー　100万倍　愛絶頂でさあ
subtitles.english: This money, a million times more, at the peak of love, come on.

subtitles.original: 覚悟決めて　トドメ刺される前のMy Heart
subtitles.english: Make up your mind, my heart before the final blow.

subtitles.original: 欲しいの？悦じゃねー
subtitles.english: Do you want it? It's not pleasure.

subtitles.original: まだベビー
subtitles.english: Still a baby.

subtitles.original: 全然負けないわ
subtitles.english: I won't lose at all.

subtitles.original: 感じさせてよ愛を
subtitles.english: Let me feel your love.

subtitles.original: あなた正体は
subtitles.english: Your true identity is...

subtitles.original: ほら逃がさない
subtitles.english: Look, I won't let you escape.
